name: @tozil/openclaw-hook
description: Production-ready Tozil cost tracking for OpenClaw — Pure JavaScript, secure, reliable

scripts.test: node -e "import('./sync_costs.js').then(m => m.syncCosts()).then(r => console.log('Sync result:', r)).catch(e => { console.error(e.message); process.exit(1); })"
